name: Chipotle Tomatillo Salsa
recipeIngredient: 3 Chipotle chilies from one 7-, ounce can of chipotle peppers in adobo sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the chipotle chilies in a blender.
2. Transfer to a large bowl.
3. Heat 1 teaspoon of oil in a heavy large skillet over high heat.
4. Add the tomatillos and cook until brown on all sides, about 7 minutes.
5. Transfer the tomatillos to a work surface.
6. Add 2 teaspoons of oil to the skillet.
7. Add the onion and sauté until tender, about 4 minutes.
8. Add the sautéed onion to the chili mixture.
9. Chop the remaining tomatillos and add them to the chili-onion mixture.
10. Mix in the cilantro, rice vinegar, and dried oregano.
11. Season with salt and pepper.
12. (Optional) The salsa can be made up to 2 days ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before serving.
